mapper.select: select * from coupon where id=#{id} for update
mapper.update: update coupon set remaining_count=remaining_count-1 where id=#{id} and remaining_count>0
mapper.select: select c.* from coupon c where c.status=1 and c.remaining_count>0 and now() between c.valid_from and c.valid_until and (select count(*) from user_coupon uc where uc.user_id=#{userId} and uc.coupon_id=c.id) < c.per_user_limit order by c.valid_until asc,c.id desc

select c.* from coupon c inner join user_coupon uc on uc.coupon_id=c.id where uc.user_id=#{userId} and uc.status=0 and uc.expire_time>now() and c.status=1 and now() between c.valid_from and c.valid_until and c.minimum_amount<=#{amount} order by c.discount_amount desc,c.valid_until asc
